violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

-Handsink in kitchen blocked by various kitchen equipment (COS) -Water for both cold and hot water were observed off. Handsinks to be maintained to promote and enable employee handwashing. -Notification signage lacking at handsinks. Guidance document provided. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as vegetables in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. -The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

-Handsink in kitchen blocked by various kitchen equipment (COS) -Water for both cold and hot water were observed off (COS) Handsinks to be maintained to promote and enable employee handwashing. -Notification signage lacking at handsinks New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The bar does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

-Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. -The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Establishment is lacking chlorine test strips for the glass washer at the bar and chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The door to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
Lightbulbs in kitchen lack a light shield. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
